name: Grade 1 Learning Commons — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: AASL and ISTE student standards
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Learning Commons pathway.

units.title: Investigate: finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to finding and evaluating information, creating media, feedback, and revision.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
